title: Junior AI Engineer
description: Start your career in artificial intelligence! Work alongside experienced engineers to build, test, and deploy AI solutions in a fast-paced, innovative environment.
details:
Incorta is a next-generation data analytics and business intelligence platform that excels at rapidly delivering business value from transactional data. We are looking for motivated individuals who are passionate about artificial intelligence and eager to grow their technical skills.

As a Junior AI Engineer, you will collaborate with senior engineers and cross-functional teams to develop AI-driven solutions that create real business impact. This role provides hands-on experience, mentorship, and clear growth opportunities.

YOU WILL:

Assist in building, training, and evaluating machine learning and deep learning models

Prepare, clean, and preprocess datasets for AI pipelines

Run experiments, analyze results, and improve model performance

Support the deployment and monitoring of AI models in production

Collaborate with data engineers, product managers, and software developers

Assist with prompt engineering and experimentation with LLMs

Document models, experiments, and technical processes

Stay up to date with AI tools, frameworks, and best practices
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related field
0–2 years of experience in AI/ML or related roles (internships included)
Solid understanding of machine learning fundamentals and basic statistics
Hands-on experience with Python and common ML libraries (Scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow)
Basic knowledge of data manipulation libraries (NumPy, Pandas)
Familiarity with cloud platforms or MLOps tools is a plus
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
Willingness to learn and work in a team-oriented environment

title: Senior AI Engineer
description: Lead the design, development, and deployment of advanced AI solutions that drive real business impact. Work on cutting-edge machine learning, deep learning, and generative AI systems in a collaborative, high-impact environment.
details:
Incorta is a next-generation data analytics and business intelligence platform that excels at rapidly delivering business value from transactional data. We are seeking experienced AI engineers who can take ownership of complex AI initiatives and mentor junior team members.

As a Senior AI Engineer, you will play a key role in architecting scalable AI systems, developing production-ready models, and collaborating closely with product, data, and engineering teams to deliver intelligent solutions.

YOU WILL:

Design, build, and deploy machine learning and deep learning models at scale

Lead end-to-end AI projects from problem definition to production deployment

Architect AI solutions including predictive models, recommendation systems, and GenAI use cases

Develop and optimize models using frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, and Scikit-learn

Work on LLM-based solutions, prompt engineering, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines

Ensure model performance, reliability, and scalability in production environments

Collaborate with data engineers on data pipelines and feature engineering

Mentor junior AI engineers and review technical work

Communicate technical concepts and results to non-technical stakeholders
requirements: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related field
5+ years of experience in AI, machine learning, or data science roles
Strong proficiency in Python and experience with ML/DL frameworks
Proven experience deploying and maintaining AI models in production
Solid understanding of statistics, optimization, and model evaluation techniques
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and MLOps practices
Familiarity with data processing tools and large-scale datasets
Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills

title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Kick-start your career in front-end development! Work with experienced developers to build user-friendly, responsive web applications while learning modern web technologies and best practices.
details:
Incorta is a next-generation data analytics and business intelligence platform that excels at rapidly delivering business value from transactional data. We are looking for motivated and creative individuals eager to grow their skills in web development and contribute to building exceptional user experiences.

As a Junior Front-End Developer, you will collaborate with designers, product managers, and senior engineers to implement web interfaces, optimize user interactions, and ensure consistent branding across platforms.

YOU WILL:

Develop responsive and interactive web pages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

Work with frameworks and libraries such as React, Vue, or Angular

Collaborate with designers to translate UI/UX designs into functional web components

Participate in code reviews and contribute to best practices

Test and debug web applications to ensure functionality and performance

Support the maintenance and enhancement of existing web applications

Assist in optimizing web pages for speed, accessibility, and responsiveness

Stay updated with the latest front-end technologies and trends
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
0–2 years of experience in front-end development (internships included)
Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and at least one modern front-end framework
Familiarity with version control systems such as Git
Good problem-solving skills and attention to detail
Eagerness to learn, adapt, and work in a team-oriented environment
Understanding of responsive design principles and web accessibility is a plus
